ResolutionEnum.description: Video resolution options (Seedance 2.0 Fast supports 480p and 720p only).
ResolutionEnum.title: ResolutionEnum

description:
Input schema for Seedance 2.0 Fast video generation.

Supports multiple modes:
- Text-to-video: provide prompt only
- Image-to-video (first frame): provide prompt + image
- Image-to-video (first + last frame): provide prompt + image + end_image
- Multimodal reference: provide prompt + reference_images/reference_videos/reference_audios

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video content. Supports English, Japanese, Indonesian, Spanish, and Portuguese.
examples: A cat stretches lazily on a sunlit windowsill, yawning as golden afternoon light filters through sheer curtains.
prompt.title: Prompt

image.description: First-frame image for image-to-video generation. Mutually exclusive with reference inputs.
image.title: Image

end_image.description: Last-frame image for first+last frame video generation. Requires image to be set as the first frame.
end_image.title: End Image

reference_images.description: Reference images for multimodal generation (up to 9). Use prompt to describe how to use each, e.g. 'Image 1', 'Image 2'. Mutually exclusive with image/end_image.
reference_images.title: Reference Images

reference_videos.description: Reference videos for multimodal generation (up to 3). Max 15s each, total max 15s. Formats: mp4/mov. Mutually exclusive with image/end_image.
reference_videos.title: Reference Videos

reference_audios.description: Reference audios for multimodal generation (up to 3). Max 15s each, total max 15s. Formats: wav/mp3. Requires at least one image or video.
reference_audios.title: Reference Audios

resolution.description: Video resolution. Seedance 2.0 Fast supports 480p and 720p only.

ratio.description: Aspect ratio. 'adaptive' auto-selects based on input content.

duration.description: Duration in seconds (4-15), or -1 for auto-select.
duration.title: Duration

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate synchronized audio with the video.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

watermark.description: Whether to add watermark to the output video.
watermark.title: Watermark

safety_identifier.description: Unique identifier of end user for platform safety policy. Must be fixed and unique per user, max 64 chars. Recommended: hash of username, user ID, or email.
safety_identifier.title: Safety Identifier

title: AppInput
